section_title: Import or export of counterfeits of the Indian coin
chapter_title: Of Offences Relating to Coin and Government Stamps
text: Whoever imports into India, or exports there from, any counterfeit coin, which he knows or has reason to believe to be a counterfeit of Indian coin, shall be punished with Imprisonment for life, or with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
